prompt: A luxury vertical beauty clinic advertisement poster designed for a premium Ginza aesthetic clinic, in a refined Japanese high-end magazine ad style. Use a tall smartphone-friendly composition with a deep black and midnight navy background, framed by a thin double-line metallic gold art deco border with elegant corner details. Place a glamorous East Asian woman from the chest up in the center-right foreground, wearing a sleeveless black evening dress, with smooth fair skin, hair in a polished low updo, and a small sparkling diamond drop earring visible on one ear. Her pose is poised and graceful, shown in three-quarter back profile with her head slightly turned, conveying exclusivity and luxury. Set the scene on a nighttime Ginza city street with cinematic bokeh lights and upscale architecture; on the left side include a recognizable classic Ginza clock-tower building glowing warmly, with modern buildings and illuminated streetlights receding into the background. The face should remain partially obscured by a soft rectangular blur overlay for privacy, matching the original layout. At the top center, add the headline in large elegant serif gold lettering: GINZA LUXE CLINIC. Along the right side, add 1 vertical Japanese tagline in large white Mincho-style serif text: 「銀座、肌の聖域へ。」. Across the lower-middle, place 1 wide metallic gold ribbon banner with realistic folds and highlights, containing 2 lines of centered white serif text: top line 「OPEN記念」 and bottom line 「全メニュー50%OFF」. Beneath the ribbon, add 1 centered Japanese sentence in white serif text: 「美への投資を、特別な価格で。」. At the bottom, add 2 centered lines of smaller white Japanese text: first line 「先着30名様限定」 and second line 「ご予約はプロフィールより」. Overall lighting should be glossy, cinematic, and luxurious, with premium skincare-ad aesthetics, strong contrast, subtle gold reflections, clean typography, and an exclusive upscale brand feel. No logos other than the clinic name, no extra products, no clutter.
